_comment: Soul Refining Sect Ancestral Ground (炼魂宗祖地) — the deep ancestral ground of the Soul Refining Sect, hidden in the Sea of Devils (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L296, L45 — Soul Refining Sect's deepest inheritance lies in the Sea of Devils region). Where the sect's oldest soul-refining formations lie. Stand-in: nether fortress (dark, ominous). Final: soul-refining ancestral altars, the Ten Billion Soul Banner's origin vault, mass soul pits, ancient restriction-sealed ancestor halls.
